versions.version_description: Easy version of this song. Enjoy.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]e|-------------------|
B|-5h7p5\3-----5/7-5-|
G|---------4\2-------| x4
D|-------------------|
A|-------------------|
E|-------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Hey, mama[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]G[/ch]
How do you get a red wine stain out of your favorite dress[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Black  mascara off a pillow case[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Cure a one too many headache[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Mama, can I come and maybe stay a few days[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
This weekend and next[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
And hey,   how do you get a red wine stain out of your favorite dress[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
How does he sleep at night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
To leave   me so eas-y[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be  alright[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna kick  myself for falling so hard[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Ma-ma, can you die from a broken heart[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
Can you ask daddy if he's got time to[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Come and look at my front door[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
It got slammed last night[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
And now it don't close right[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
And just promise that you won't tell him everything[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And keep  that pistol in the drawer[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Mama, please don't say[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna laugh about this someday[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
You didn't see the way he drove away[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
How does he sleep at night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
To leave   me so eas-y[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be  alright[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna kick  myself for falling so hard[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Ma-ma, can you die from a broken heart[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Whoo, a broken heart[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Can your knees give out from praying so hard?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
Can you go blind from crying in the dark?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
Was it ever really real if he don't feel how I feel?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
How does he sleep at night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
To leave   me so easy[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be  alright[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
How does he sleep at night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Mama, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
To leave   me so eas-y[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be  alright[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna kick  myself for falling so hard[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Ma-ma, can you die from a broken heart[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, a broken heart...    ah-ah[/tab]
